global.description: The ad features a solid green background with abstract shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting financial clarity and peace of mind with NovaPay.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and calming base.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping abstract shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in lighter shades of green, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Additional abstract shape
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape, possibly another rectangle, in a lighter hue, located slightly below the main subject.

elements.label: Additional abstract shape
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape in a lighter shade, positioned below the main subject, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular decorative element in a lighter shade, located towards the bottom left.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular decorative element in a lighter shade, positioned towards the center bottom.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular decorative element in a lighter shade, located towards the bottom right.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind' positioned centrally at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The logo 'NovaPay' in bold white font, located at the top left corner.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Shop now' at the bottom center.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small white text displaying the price '$4.99' located at the bottom left.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, key elements include abstract shapes and clear messaging.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered at the bottom, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your money, clearer, Built for peace of mind, NovaPay, Shop now, $4.99
